heading: Power to amend, repeal, etc., reserved
label: 361i Power to amend, repeal, etc., reserved
text: The Congress may at any time, amend, suspend, or repeal any or all of the provisions of sections 361a to 361i of this title.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to . The provisions of section 368b were eliminated from .section 368b of this titlesection 361i of this title

Amendments1955—Act , amended section generally to reserve the right to Congress to amend, suspend, or repeal any or all of the provisions of sections 361a to 361i of this title, and to strike out provisions which subjected grants of moneys to the legislative assent of the several States and Territories.Aug. 11, 1955
